sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99726" key="sundiasu/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδια-σύρω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n99726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in depreciating</tr_>, prob. cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.631e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
